name: AliasVault
tagline: Self-hosted email alias management for privacy protection
subtitle: Protect your real inbox with disposable and persistent aliases
description: AliasVault is a privacy-focused, self-hostable email alias management platform. It lets you generate, manage, and forward email aliases to protect your real address. The system supports SMTP forwarding, passwordless authentication, disposable aliases, and full self-hosted deployments for maximum control over your data.

features.title: Email Alias Management
features.description: Create, organize, and manage unlimited email aliases

features.title: Alias Forwarding
features.description: Forward alias emails to one or more real inboxes

features.title: Disposable Aliases
features.description: Create throwaway aliases that can be disabled at any time

features.title: Passwordless Authentication
features.description: Login securely using magic links instead of passwords

features.title: Web Dashboard
features.description: Manage aliases through a modern web interface

features.title: Self-Hosted Deployment
features.description: Run AliasVault on your own infrastructure for full privacy control

notes: Requires a working SMTP server for email forwarding
Best suited for privacy-focused self-hosting users
